# Jira Comment

The following comment would be posted to the created Bug issue.

## Comment Content

Bug report created with the following sections:

**Included sections:**
- Issue Description
- Steps to Reproduce
- Expected Result
- Actual Result
- Environment / Version
- Attachments
- Root Cause
- Suggested Fix

**Skipped sections:** None (all optional sections were provided)

---

*This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/report-bug](https://github.com/RHEcosystemAppEng/sdlc-plugins) v0.13.3.*

## ADF Representation

The comment footnote in ADF format appended at the end of the document's `content` array:

```json
{
  "type": "rule"
},
{
  "type": "paragraph",
  "content": [
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": "This comment was AI-generated by "
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": "sdlc-workflow/report-bug",
      "marks": [
        {
          "type": "link",
          "attrs": {
            "href": "https://github.com/RHEcosystemAppEng/sdlc-plugins"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": " v0.13.3."
    }
  ]
}
```
